evidence_contract.question: Did the Codex-supervised P44 run produce a complete traceable evidence chain for M0--M7 while separating same-target passes from diagnostic-only passes and preserving blockers?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: The M0 target-governance matrix and every M0--M7 phase result, review ledger, evidence manifest, and command log are the governing closeout baseline. M8 introduces no new numerical comparator.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: Every prior phase has a result note, Claude review verdict, evidence manifest, two command logs, pass token, and explicit claim class supported by terms in that phase's result note, Claude review ledger, and evidence manifest; same-target passes are separated from stress/diagnostic-only passes; remaining blockers are classified; no new numerical claim is introduced by closeout.
veto_diagnostics: any phase result overclaims beyond its evidence class
public API/HMC/paper-scale claims appear without separate evidence
claim-class or nonclaim boundaries appear only as hardcoded M8 summaries rather than as terms verified from prior phase artifacts

commands.purpose: Run P44 closeout traceability audit over M0--M7 result notes, review ledgers, evidence manifests, and command logs.
Compile the P44 closeout audit script.

diagnostics.summary: Local M8 closeout audit found phase_count 8 and verified M0--M7 result notes, review ledgers, manifests, command logs, pass tokens, phase-pass evidence states, claim-class support terms in prior artifacts, common HMC/paper-scale nonclaim boundaries, global score/public API nonclaims from M8 closeout artifacts, and exact blocker classes implementation/numerical-reference/scientific-evidence/target-definition. M8 introduces no new numerical result and preserves blockers for M4 T4 Zhao--Cui, M3 CUT4 quadratic stress, M5/M6 native target equality, and M7 generalized-SV native target/reference.

long_run_controls.resource_caps: No long run; closeout audit and compile check only.
